task_completion.description: Open the Search Messages dialog in Thunderbird.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Search Messages' dialog window is open and visible in the screenshots.

task_completion.description: Set the search scope to the Inbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Search Messages dialog, the 'Search for messages in:' dropdown is set to 'Inbox'.

task_completion.description: Set the search condition field to 'Subject'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first dropdown menu in the search condition row is set to 'Subject'.

task_completion.description: Set the search condition keyword to 'budget'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text input box in the search condition row contains the word 'budget'.

task_completion.description: Name the saved search 'Q4 Budget Review'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New Saved Search Folder' dialog is visible, and the 'Name:' text field contains exactly 'Q4 Budget Review'.

task_completion.description: Verify the saved search folder is created under Local Folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The folder 'Q4 Budget Review' is visible in the left folder pane under 'Local Folders'. It should ideally have a saved search icon (a folder with a magnifying glass).

integrity.description: The agent used the Thunderbird graphical user interface to create the saved search.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Thunderbird application windows and dialogs, rather than terminal commands modifying Thunderbird profile files.

integrity.description: The agent created an actual saved search folder, not a standard folder.
integrity.visual_evidence: The folder was created via the 'Save as Search Folder' button/dialog, or the resulting folder in the left pane displays the specific saved search icon (folder with a magnifying glass), rather than a standard folder icon.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown executing commands like sqlite3 or directly editing virtualFolders.dat or prefs.js.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected saved search folder name is exactly 'Q4 Budget Review'. The search must be scoped to the 'Inbox'. The search condition must check the 'Subject' field for the keyword 'budget'.
